description: Tan skirt made of 100% polyester, has an elasticated wasitband with loops and ethnic print Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours Do not bleach or dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron if required arrow woman caters to every fashionista. This skirt from arrow Woman is for those who love the exotic. Pair it with a solid coloured top, a vibrant polyester scarf and knee high boots. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and waist 26"
